changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.mustChange: You must change your password before continuing.
changePassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

translators.title: Translator Management
translators.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable translator "{{name}}"?

admins.title: Admin Account Management
admins.deleteSelfTooltip: You cannot delete your own account
admins.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete admin "{{name}}" ({{email}})? This action cannot be undone.
admins.createSuccess: Admin account created. The user must change password on first login.
admins.createFailed: Failed to create, email may already be in use

patients.title: Patient Management
patients.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete patient "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
patients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or ID number
patients.duplicateError: A patient with the same ID type and number already exists

schedules.title: Schedule Management
schedules.patientRequired: Please add at least one patient

checkins.title: Check-in Records
checkins.googleNotConfigured: Google credentials not set. Please contact administrator.

geo.idle: Please tap the button below to allow location access.
geo.denied: Location permission denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
geo.unavailable: Location service is unavailable on this device.
geo.timeout: Location request timed out. Please try again.

checkin.androidInstructions: Android: Open browser settings → Site permissions → Location → Allow
checkin.chromeInstructions: Chrome: Click the lock icon in the address bar → Allow location

exportSettings.title: Scheduled Export Settings
exportSettings.hint: When the day of month is reached, the system will generate the report in the background. For Google Sheet format, set GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE on the server side first.
exportSettings.runSuccess: Export executed; the file has been sent.

errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Server error, please try again later
errors.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account is temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts
errors.CANNOT_RESET_SELF: Cannot reset your own password through this endpoint
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own admin account
errors.NOT_AN_ADMIN: Target user is not an admin
errors.NOT_A_TRANSLATOR: Target user is not a translator
errors.RECURRENCE_UNTIL_BEFORE_START: Recurrence until date must be after start date
errors.NO_RECURRENCE_DATES: No dates generated for the given recurrence rule
errors.SCHEDULE_NOT_OWNED: This schedule does not belong to you
errors.DUPLICATE_CHECKIN: You have already checked in for this type
errors.ARRIVE_BEFORE_LEAVE: Please check in (arrive) before checking out (leave)
errors.PATIENT_DUPLICATE: A patient with the same ID type and number already exists
errors.SCHEDULE_PATIENTS_REQUIRED: Please add at least one patient
errors.DUPLICATE_PATIENT_IN_SCHEDULE: This patient is already in the schedule
errors.PATIENT_TIME_OUT_OF_RANGE: Patient time slot is outside the schedule range
errors.PATIENT_END_BEFORE_START: Patient end time must be after start time
errors.DIAGNOSIS_PHOTO_LIMIT: Diagnosis photo limit reached (max 3 per patient)
errors.DIAGNOSIS_NOT_OWNED: This patient slot does not belong to you
errors.NO_SHOW_REASON_REQUIRED: Please enter a reason for the no-show
errors.CHECKOUT_BLOCKED_BY_PENDING: Please process all patients (upload diagnosis or mark no-show) before checking out

diagnosis.noShowReasonPlaceholder: Why didn't the patient show up?
diagnosis.tooManyFiles: You can only upload up to 3 photos
